sleeves.summary: Broad global equity exposure still reads as the cleanest core implementation, but benchmark and implementation comparisons remain worth rechecking.
Developed ex-US exposure remains optional rather than urgent, so the sleeve can stay in monitor mode while relative cost and tax posture are watched.
Emerging markets still add diversification potential, but macro sensitivity and implementation differences keep the sleeve in active review.
Investment-grade bonds continue to serve as ballast, and no urgent sleeve-level change is implied by the current context.

market_state_summary: Recent market moves are meaningful enough to justify another review pass, but not strong enough on their own to force a sleeve rotation. The current read is to prioritize context, evidence depth, and fit before any action language strengthens.
